---
name: web-spec-writing
description: '**WORKFLOW SKILL** — Generate comprehensive web development specifications including requirements analysis, architecture design, and implementation details. USE FOR: creating detailed specs for web projects, documenting features, planning development phases. DO NOT USE FOR: general coding tasks, implementation, or debugging.'
---

# Web Specification Writing

## Overview
This skill guides the process of writing detailed specifications for web development projects, ensuring comprehensive documentation of requirements, architecture, and implementation plans.

## Workflow Steps

### 1. Requirements Gathering
- Analyze project goals and objectives
- Identify target users and use cases
- Document functional and non-functional requirements
- Define acceptance criteria

### 2. Architecture Design
- Design system architecture and components
- Define data models and API structures
- Plan technology stack and frameworks
- Create wireframes and user flow diagrams

### 3. Implementation Planning
- Break down features into tasks
- Define development phases and milestones
- Specify testing strategies
- Document deployment and maintenance plans

### 4. Documentation
- Write detailed specification document
- Include diagrams and mockups
- Define success metrics
- Create implementation guidelines

## Quality Checks
- Ensure all requirements are traceable
- Validate technical feasibility
- Confirm stakeholder alignment
- Review for completeness and clarity

## Assets
- Specification templates
- Wireframe examples
- Architecture diagrams
- Checklist for requirements validation
